sscma_begin_i2c.message0:
Initialize SSCMA AI module %1 I2C interface %2
Reset pin %3 I2C address %4
sscma_begin_i2c.tooltip: Initialize the SSCMA AI module and communicate using the I2C interface

sscma_begin_serial.message0:
Initialize SSCMA AI module %1 Serial interface %2
Reset pin %3 Baud rate %4
sscma_begin_serial.tooltip: Initialize the SSCMA AI module and communicate using the serial port interface

sscma_begin_spi.message0:
Initialize SSCMA AI module %1 SPI interface %2
CS pin %3 SYNC pin %4
Reset pin %5 Clock frequency %6 MHz
sscma_begin_spi.tooltip: Initialize the SSCMA AI module and communicate using the SPI interface

sscma_invoke.message0: %1 Get the result of executing AI inference Number of inferences %2 Filter %3 Display %4
sscma_invoke.tooltip: Perform AI inference and obtain detection results

sscma_return_status.tooltip: SSCMA command execution result status constant

sscma_get_boxes_count.message0: %1 Get the number of target detection results
sscma_get_boxes_count.tooltip: Get the number of detected target frames

sscma_get_box_info.message0: %1 Get target detection information Index %2 Attribute %3
sscma_get_box_info.tooltip: Get the attribute information of the specified detection frame

sscma_get_classes_count.message0: %1 Get the number of classification detection results
sscma_get_classes_count.tooltip: Get the number of classification results

sscma_get_class_info.message0: %1 Get classification detection information Index %2 Attribute %3
sscma_get_class_info.tooltip: Get attribute information of specified classification results

sscma_get_points_count.message0: %1 Get the number of key points
sscma_get_points_count.tooltip: Get the number of key points

sscma_get_point_info.message0: %1 Get key point information Index %2 Attribute %3
sscma_get_point_info.tooltip: Get attribute information of specified keypoint

sscma_check_last_image.message0: %1 Whether there is the latest frame of image data
sscma_check_last_image.tooltip: Check if SSCMA has the latest frame of image data available

sscma_get_last_image.message0: %1 Get the latest frame of image data
sscma_get_last_image.tooltip: Get the latest frame of image data processed by SSCMA

sscma_get_performance.tooltip: Get the processing time of the specified stage (milliseconds)

sscma_available.tooltip: Check if SSCMA has readable data

sscma_get_device_id.tooltip: Get the unique ID of the SSCMA device

sscma_get_device_name.tooltip: Get the name of the SSCMA device

sscma_get_device_info.tooltip: Get detailed information of SSCMA device

sscma_save_jpeg.tooltip: Save current image as JPEG format
